title: RFTools Dimensions
description: This is an addon mod for RFTools which handles creation of dimensions
body:
# RFTools Dimensions

This mod requires RFTools. It adds machines and tools to create dimensions using RF power.

## Support 
You can support me by [pledging on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/McJty).

## Introduction video
<iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qruPB0cOatQ" width="560" height="315" title="Introducing RFTools Dimensions for 1.18 and Tutorial
" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Ravine Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N4D9AicU/images/8aa6f696dd42480c20aeb6aca6a869c6fff86c44.png)

![Floating islands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N4D9AicU/images/e874dfd0c5ab06239dc874d47229b8f7a9d68689.png)

![Massive Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N4D9AicU/images/002c89c193e1fe9a681116f25d160b55f9cefa34.png)

Thanks!
